items.title_zh: G42与桑坦德银行达成人工智能合作
items.title_en: G42 and Banco Santander form artificial intelligence partnership
items.summary_zh: G42与西班牙桑坦德银行宣布建立人工智能合作伙伴关系。双方将共同探索AI在金融服务领域的应用，包括风险管理和客户体验优化。此次合作旨在利用G42的AI技术能力，结合桑坦德银行的银行业务经验，推动金融行业的数字化转型。具体合作细节尚未完全披露，但预计将涉及联合研发和项目落地。
items.summary_en: G42 and Banco Santander form artificial intelligence partnership Telecompaper
items.why_zh: 此次合作标志着AI技术在传统金融领域的进一步渗透，可能加速银行业智能化转型。
items.why_en: This partnership marks further penetration of AI in traditional finance, potentially accelerating banking digital transformation.

items.title_zh: 高通宣布车端人工智能 Claw 生态计划，将智能体 AI 引入智能座舱
items.title_en: Qualcomm launches automotive AI Claw ecosystem plan, bringing agentic AI to smart cockpits
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，在今日于无锡举行的 2026 高通汽车技术与合作峰会上，高通技术公司与诚迈科技、车联天下、斑马智能、德赛西威、镁佳科技、中科创达等生态企业， 宣布 车端人工智能 Claw 生态计划 。 官方表示，此项生态计划将骁龙数字底盘解决方案与高通智能体 AI 运行环境结合，并发挥各家生态企业在座舱、车载操作系统、智能体中间件、AI 应用和量产交付方面的能力。这一计划旨在 消除长期以来阻碍下一代汽车智能开发的碎片化问题 ，为车企提供一条从概念验证到量产落地更快速、更集成化的路径。 通过车端人工智能 Claw 生态计划，高通技术公司与生态企业致力于 将 AI 智能体和多模态大模型直接部署到车端 ，推动汽车从“移动工具”进化为“智能伙伴”。 IT之家获悉，车端人工智能 Claw 生态计划和智能体 AI 运行环境聚焦以下核心能力： 全天候多模态感知 ：通过对车内外摄像头、音频、车辆状态等实时数据进行智能融合，系统能够对车辆环境形成全天候在线的智能理解 —— 从执行单一指令，升级为能够读懂情境并能够预判驾驶员需求的智能座舱。 支持复杂决策的百亿参数大模型 ：依托在终端侧实时运行的混合专家模型（MoE），系统能够在复杂座舱场景中实现高级语义理解、逻辑推理和多步骤任务规划，无论车辆是否联网，都可全天候赋能快速、安全的交互体验。 车规级安全架构 ：六层安全机制覆盖车辆控制分级、…
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Qualcomm Automotive Technology and Cooperation Summit, Qualcomm and ecosystem partners announced the Claw ecosystem plan for automotive AI. It integrates Snapdragon Digital Chassis with Qualcomm's agentic AI runtime to address fragmentation in smart car development, enabling multimodal perception, MoE models, and automotive-grade security.
items.why_zh: 该计划有望加速智能座舱和自动驾驶的AI落地，解决行业碎片化痛点。
items.why_en: This plan could accelerate AI deployment in smart cockpits and autonomous driving, addressing industry fragmentation.

items.title_zh: 通义实验室推出通用智能体评测基准PawBench
items.title_en: Tongyi Lab launches general AI agent benchmark PawBench
items.summary_zh: 通义实验室推出通用智能体评测基准PawBench 金融界
items.summary_en: Tongyi Lab has released PawBench, a general benchmark for evaluating AI agents across tasks including planning, reasoning, and tool use. It provides a standardized platform to advance agent technology.
items.why_zh: PawBench为AI智能体提供了统一的评测标准，有助于推动该领域的技术进步和产业应用。
items.why_en: PawBench provides a unified evaluation standard for AI agents, promoting technological progress and industrial application.

items.title_zh: 视觉内容社交平台 Pinterest 为 AI 服务导入亚马逊 AWS Trainium 芯片
items.title_en: Pinterest adopts AWS Trainium chips for AI services
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，视觉内容社交平台 Pinterest 美国当地时间本月 4 日宣布大幅扩展与 Amazon AWS 亚马逊云科技的合作， 计划在 2031 年前在 AWS 云服务上投入 40 亿美元 （IT之家注：现汇率约合 271.55 亿元人民币）。 IT之家注意到，Pinterest 在其新闻稿中表示 将扩大对亚马逊定制芯片的使用 ，包括 CPU 和 AI ASIC。该企业约 1/3 的计算基础设施已运行在 AWS Graviton 系列 Arm CPU 上，而这一比例还将提升；另一方面，其将利用 AWS Trainium 托管和运行 LLM / VLM 模型，支持个性化视觉搜索和 AI 辅助发现等使用体验。 Pinterest 首席技术官 Matt Madrigal 表示： Pinterest 正在大力投资人工智能，旨在为每月使用我们平台的数亿用户提供更加个性化、视觉化且可操作的发现体验。 与 AWS 深化合作，为我们提供了计算灵活性、硬件选择自由度以及基础设施效率，从而加速实现我们在 Pinterest 上打造新一代视觉发现体验的 AI 愿景。 这一战略合作伙伴关系将助力 Pinterest 加速 AI 创新，通过推进我们的专有模型和开源模型的应用，同时提升用户体验和广告主效果。
items.summary_en: Pinterest announced a $4 billion investment in AWS through 2031, expanding use of custom chips like Graviton and Trainium to run LLM/VLM models for personalized visual search and AI discovery.
items.why_zh: 此举表明Pinterest正大力投资AI基础设施，以提升用户体验和广告效果。
items.why_en: This move underscores Pinterest's heavy investment in AI infrastructure to enhance user experience and ad performance.

items.title_zh: 消息称 LG 将引进 1 万块英伟达 Blackwell GPU，为其迄今最大规模
items.title_en: LG reportedly to acquire 10,000 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, its largest-ever purchase
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，韩媒《每日经济》当地时间今日报道称，LG 集团将引进 1 万块 NVIDIA（英伟达）Blackwell 架构 GPU，用于其人工智能转型 (AX) 计划。 这是 该集团有史以来最大规模的单次英伟达 GPU 采购 。消息人士预测购入这批 GPU 与配套设施建设的 整体投资将达到数万亿韩元 。 LG 集团旗下多家实体均需求 GPU AI 算力：LG 人工智能研究院正持续开发 EXAONE 系列大语言模型；LG 电子则正积极推进人形机器人的商业化进程；LG U+ 不仅是韩国三大电信运营商之一也是该国重要的 AI 云服务供应商。 报道指出，NVIDIA 联合创始人、总裁兼首席执行官黄仁勋今日会见的韩国商界代表中就包括 LG 集团会长具光谟。
items.summary_en: LG Group is reportedly acquiring 10,000 NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs for its AI transformation, the largest single purchase ever. The investment is expected to be trillions of KRW, supporting LLM development, robotics, and AI cloud services.
items.why_zh: 大规模GPU采购凸显LG加速AI转型的决心，可能影响韩国AI产业格局。
items.why_en: The massive GPU purchase highlights LG's commitment to AI transformation, potentially impacting Korea's AI industry landscape.

items.title_zh: 京东 MALL 香港首店落地，未来三年提供超 1 万个本地就业岗位
items.title_en: JD MALL opens first Hong Kong store, plans over 10,000 local jobs in three years
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，京东 618 香港发布会今日在港举办， 香港首家京东 MALL 宣布将于 6 月 18 日在湾仔正式开业 ，京东佳宝超市 618 期间第 100 家香港门店开张运营。 京东官方表示， 目前京东在港投资额已超 350 亿港元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 303.28 亿元人民币） ，已在港全面布局零售、物流、科技、健康、产发等核心业务。 发布会上，京东宣布未来三年计划 —— 将在香港携手 1000 个头部品牌、布局超 200 个线下门店、 提供超 1 万个就业岗位 ，全面深化集团在港业务生态。 即将正式开业的京东 MALL 香港湾仔店拥有 3 万英尺经营空间，门店采用港采港销模式，囊括大小家电、手机数码等经典核心品类，还引入智能卫浴、按摩设备、全屋清洁电器等品类。 同时， 门店落地“先玩后买”、“先用后买”模式 ，并打造机器人体验、咖啡体验、电竞 PC DIY、休闲按摩等多个特色专区。 京东官方表示，目前，京东物流已在香港形成了“香港最快 4 小时送到”“揽派至 22 时”“港澳次日达”等服务，并打通内地、香港、澳门三地互寄通道。 IT之家获悉， 京东 MALL 计划三年内在港开设 6-8 家门店 ，优先布局沙田、旺角、屯门等热门商圈。
items.summary_en: JD.com announced the opening of its first JD MALL in Hong Kong on June 18, with over HK$35 billion invested. It plans 200+ stores and 10,000+ jobs in three years, featuring 'try before you buy' and logistics as fast as 4 hours.
items.why_zh: 京东加速香港线下布局，显示其深化本地化战略和拓展零售版图的决心。
items.why_en: JD's accelerated offline expansion in Hong Kong underscores its localization strategy and retail growth ambitions.

items.title_zh: Meta黑客事件显示AI安全不止于Mythos
items.title_en: The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos
items.summary_zh: 据404 Media报道，攻击者利用Meta的AI客服代理窃取Instagram账户，通过让代理将账户链接到攻击者控制的邮箱，成功入侵包括奥巴马白宫账号在内的多个账户。此前Anthropic曾因Mythos模型黑客能力过强而限制其发布。此次事件凸显AI安全问题的复杂性，不仅限于模型本身，还包括AI系统的应用安全。
items.summary_en: On June 5, 404 Media reported that attackers had been using Meta’s AI customer support agent to steal Instagram accounts. Their approach was simple: They asked the agent to link the accounts to email addresses that they controlled, and the agent complied. One attacker broke into the dormant Obama White House account and made pro-Iran posts; others took over accounts with valuable, single-word handles, possibly in order to sell them. AI cybersecurity concerns are nothing new. Since Anthropic announced in April that its Mythos model was too good at hacking to be released to the general public, c…
items.why_zh: 该事件警示AI系统的应用安全同样关键，需防范AI被恶意利用。
items.why_en: This incident warns that application security of AI systems is critical, preventing malicious exploitation.

items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴联合NBA中国推出首款官方大模型，恒生互联网ETF华夏(513330)全天成交额超20亿元
items.title_en: Alibaba and NBA China launch first official large model
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴联合NBA中国推出首款官方大模型，恒生互联网ETF华夏(513330)全天成交额超20亿元 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Alibaba and NBA China have launched their first official large model, with details yet to be disclosed. The collaboration may involve sports content generation or fan engagement. The Hang Seng Internet ETF saw over 2 billion yuan in trading volume.
items.why_zh: 此次合作标志着AI在体育领域的应用拓展，可能开启体育产业智能化新篇章。
items.why_en: This partnership marks AI's expansion into sports, potentially opening a new chapter in sports industry intelligence.

items.title_zh: 智谱跌超9% 市值蒸发575亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Plunges Over 9%, Market Cap Loses HK$57.5 Billion
items.summary_zh: 智谱跌超9% 市值蒸发575亿港元 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's stock price plummeted over 9%, wiping out approximately HK$57.5 billion in market value. The sharp decline has drawn market attention, though specific reasons remain unclear. This may reflect investor concerns over AI sector valuation adjustments.
items.why_zh: 智谱是国产大模型代表企业，其股价暴跌可能预示市场对AI公司估值逻辑的转变。
items.why_en: Zhipu AI is a leading domestic AI model company; its stock plunge may signal a shift in market valuation logic for AI firms.

items.title_zh: Token大战中，华为云选择了第三条路｜最前线
items.title_en: Huawei Cloud Takes a Different Path: Focuses on Domestic Computing Power Health, Not Token Price
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 邓咏仪 编辑 | 张雨忻 “在国产化算力供应受限的情况下，华为云现在不太在乎Token总量是多少，也不太在乎收入的总量是多少，在乎的是国产化的算力系统所生产出来的Tokens的健康度，并且要代表着生产力提升，而不仅仅是情绪价值。” 6月5日，2026华为云 INSPIRE 创想者大会在上海开幕，华为云CEO周跃峰表示。 他举了个例子：一个人闲来无事在手机上问 AI 一个问题，也会产生 Token，但这种 Token 的价值有多大很难说明。在他看来，衡量一朵云做得好不好，不该强调它跑出了多少万亿 Token，而该看这些 Token 替企业提了多少效率。 华为云CEO周跃峰 过去两年，中国云厂商围绕 Token 打了一场旷日持久的价格战：2024年5月，在DeepSeek V2打响降价的第一枪后，火山引擎豆包以0.0008元/千 Token 的定价点燃战火，而后阿里，百度、腾讯、讯飞相继入场，自此开始了模型厂商的第一场战事。 这套打法的内核，是用低价模型引流、带动背后的公有云销售，代价则是推理算力的毛利率一度被压到为负。一直到DeepSeek R1打开推理时代范式之后，Coding和视频模型再度激起了真正的Token大战。 而在这次发布会上，华为云这次并没有出降价牌，而是提出一个名为“Agentic Infra”的新范式，瞄准国产算力。所有人都比谁的Token更便宜、谁的调用…
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Huawei Cloud INSPIRE conference, CEO Zhou Yuefeng introduced a new paradigm 'Agentic Infra', emphasizing that cloud quality should be measured by productivity improvement, not token volume or price. Huawei Cloud opts out of the price war, focusing on the health of domestic computing power systems.
items.why_zh: 华为云此举可能改变中国云厂商以低价Token争夺市场的竞争格局，引导行业回归价值创造。
items.why_en: Huawei Cloud's strategy may shift the competitive landscape from price wars to value creation in the Chinese cloud market.

items.title_zh: 突传重磅！DeepSeek首轮融资500亿腾讯、宁德时代重磅入局，梁文锋自掏200亿
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 50 Billion in First Round, Tencent and CATL Invest, Liang Wenfeng Puts in 20 Billion
items.summary_zh: 突传重磅！DeepSeek首轮融资500亿腾讯、宁德时代重磅入局，梁文锋自掏200亿 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek reportedly completes a massive first-round funding of 50 billion yuan, with Tencent and CATL among investors, and founder Liang Wenfeng contributing 20 billion. This reflects strong market confidence in DeepSeek's technology and will accelerate its development.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的巨额融资表明AI大模型赛道仍受资本热捧，且头部企业融资规模持续刷新纪录。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive funding round shows that the AI large model sector continues to attract significant capital, with record-breaking investment amounts.

items.title_zh: 豆包将上线付费功能 大模型尝试盈利模式将提升板块估值？
items.title_en: Doubao to Launch Paid Features, AI Models Explore Profit Models Potentially Boosting Sector Valuation
items.summary_zh: 豆包将上线付费功能 大模型尝试盈利模式将提升板块估值？ 第一财经
items.summary_en: ByteDance's AI product Doubao plans to introduce paid features, signaling a shift towards monetization for large language models. This could improve sector valuation expectations and drive the industry towards sustainable profitability.
items.why_zh: 豆包付费功能的推出是大模型商业化的重要尝试，可能为行业盈利模式提供参考。
items.why_en: Doubao's paid features represent a key attempt at LLM monetization, potentially setting a precedent for the industry.

items.title_zh: NBA 中国基于阿里千问打造首个官方大模型，可解读球员位置、得分等核心数据
items.title_en: NBA China Launches First Official AI Model 'NBA Chat' Powered by Alibaba's Qwen
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，阿里云今天（5 日）通过公众号宣布，NBA 总决赛开赛之际，NBA 中国携手阿里巴巴打造的 首个官方大模型“NBA Chat” 正式上线，用户可在“NBA 中国”App 中体验。 据悉，NBA Chat 的模型底座是阿里千问大模型，结合 NBA 丰富的数字资产进行微调，包括 篮球历史数据、球员深度分析 等。目前，NBA Chat 可为球迷提供 智能篮球问答服务 ，后续将持续升级 Agent 能力。比如，所支持球队的场上战术没看懂，可以随时找它拆解；巅峰对决没看过瘾，可以在赛后找它复盘， 了解球员位置、得分等核心数据 。 去年 10 月，阿里巴巴成为 NBA 中国官方云计算与人工智能合作伙伴。据IT之家了解，在去年的 NBA 中国赛上，阿里云还展示了 360 度实时回放技术 ，为球迷提供关键比赛时刻的增强版回放。该系统运用阿里的 AI 算法，可精准捕捉球员动作，并以 360 度环绕视角生成高质量回放画面。 相关阅读： 《 NBA 中国与阿里云宣布达成多年合作，将首次推出“360 度实时回放技术” 》
items.summary_en: NBA China and Alibaba Cloud launch 'NBA Chat', the first official AI model fine-tuned on Alibaba's Qwen, offering intelligent Q&A on basketball data. It can interpret player positions, scores, and more, with plans to upgrade agent capabilities for tactical analysis.
items.why_zh: NBA Chat展示了AI在体育领域的垂直应用潜力，为体育赛事智能化互动树立了标杆。
items.why_en: NBA Chat demonstrates the potential of AI in sports, setting a benchmark for intelligent interaction in sports events.

items.title_zh: MiniMax 就改用 Token 计费致歉，公布订阅权益保护与档位迁移方案
items.title_en: MiniMax Apologizes for Token Billing Changes, Announces User Protection Plan
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，MiniMax 发布 Token Plan 升级与权益调整说明，就 M3 模型上线后的 Token Plan 计费切换、订阅权益保护与档位迁移方案进行说明。 MiniMax 表示： 我们收到大家关于 Token Plan 的许多反馈。 本次调整未能提前与大家充分沟通并详细说明 M3 对应的 Token Plan 计费和套餐变化，是我们工作不到位 。在老用户周限额等问题上处理也不够妥当，给一直支持我们的用户带来了困扰，请大家见谅。 M3 是一个更大尺寸、更加智能、多模态、拥有 1M 上下文的全新模型，它能够完成更加复杂的任务，也意味着需要更多的算力资源，需要全新的定价模式。M3 可以做越来越复杂的任务，自运行越来越长的时间，意味着单次调用的资源消耗指数提升，一次调用就可能消耗掉相当于过去多次调用的资源。继续沿用旧的计量口径，难以让每位用户都获得稳定一致的体验。同时 Token Plan 支持 MiniMax 多个模态的模型，我们收到许多用户反馈，希望能够将订阅额度自由使用到不同模态模型上。 因此我们将 Token Plan 切换到行业统一的 Token-Based 计量，让每个人按真实使用量获得对等价值，让 M3 的能力能够更稳定、可持续地交付到每位用户手中 。 为了尽快将 M3 交到大家手上，过去几周团队经历了高强度的工作，我们疏忽了提前与大家充分沟通…
items.summary_en: MiniMax apologizes for not adequately communicating the Token billing changes for its M3 model, which requires more resources. The company admits mishandling user limits and announces a protection plan for subscribers.
items.why_zh: MiniMax的致歉和调整方案反映了AI公司在模型升级与用户权益平衡中的挑战。
items.why_en: MiniMax's apology highlights the challenge AI companies face in balancing model upgrades with user rights.

items.title_zh: 原力灵机合并Atomix并获战略融资，智谱、商汤等入局_车市动态
items.title_en: Yuanli Lingji Merges with Atomix, Secures Strategic Investment from Zhipu AI, SenseTime, etc.
items.summary_zh: 原力灵机合并Atomix并获战略融资，智谱、商汤等入局_车市动态 中金在线
items.summary_en: Yuanli Lingji merges with Atomix and secures strategic funding from Zhipu AI, SenseTime, and others. The merger aims to combine AI chip and sensor fusion technologies to accelerate autonomous driving applications.
items.why_zh: 此次合并与融资显示AI芯片与自动驾驶赛道持续整合，头部企业加速布局。
items.why_en: The merger and funding indicate ongoing consolidation in AI chips and autonomous driving, with leading players accelerating their presence.

items.title_zh: 机构预计今年半导体市场规模或达1.5万亿美元，存储芯片销售额同比将上升250%
items.title_en: WSTS Forecasts $1.5 Trillion Semiconductor Market in 2026, Memory Chip Sales Up 250%
items.summary_zh: 近日，世界半导体贸易统计组织（WSTS）发布了2026年春季半导体市场预测报告，大幅上调了对2026年及2027年全球半导体行业的增长预期。数据显示，得益于2025年底及2026年初异常强劲的市场表现，WSTS预计2026年全球半导体市场将实现同比90%的增长，总规模达到1.51万亿美元。全球半导体市场规模的加速增长主要由存储芯片领域主导。2026年存储芯片销售额同比将上升约250%，一举超过8000亿美元。人工智能基础设施、高带宽存储器（HBM）以及加速计算平台的持续强劲需求，仍是整个半导体行业增长的核心驱动力。（财联社）
items.summary_en: The World Semiconductor Trade Statistics (WSTS) released its spring 2026 forecast, projecting 90% year-over-year growth to $1.51 trillion, driven by memory chip sales surging 250% to over $800 billion. Strong demand for AI infrastructure, HBM, and accelerated computing remains the core growth driver.
items.why_zh: 该预测凸显了AI对半导体行业的巨大拉动作用，存储芯片需求激增是AI基础设施扩张的直接体现。
items.why_en: This forecast highlights AI's massive impact on the semiconductor industry, with surging memory chip demand directly reflecting AI infrastructure expansion.

items.title_zh: 豆包汽车上线！赛力斯、字节合作全新汽车品牌：6月9日发布
items.title_en: Seres and ByteDance Launch 'Doubao Auto' Brand, Debut on June 9
items.summary_zh: 豆包汽车上线！赛力斯、字节合作全新汽车品牌：6月9日发布 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Seres and ByteDance have launched a new auto brand 'Doubao Auto', set to debut on June 9. The brand combines Seres' manufacturing with ByteDance's tech, expected to feature AI-powered smart cockpit and autonomous driving capabilities.
items.why_zh: 该合作展示了科技巨头与车企跨界融合的新模式，字节跳动的AI能力有望重塑汽车智能化体验。
items.why_en: This partnership exemplifies a new model of cross-industry integration between tech giants and automakers, with ByteDance's AI poised to reshape in-car intelligence.

items.title_zh: 豆包汽车上线！赛力斯、字节合作全新汽车品牌：6月9日发布
items.title_en: Doubao Auto Launches! Seres and ByteDance to Unveil New Car Brand on June 9
items.summary_zh: 豆包汽车上线！赛力斯、字节合作全新汽车品牌：6月9日发布 搜狐网
items.summary_en: ByteDance's Doubao partners with Seres to launch a new car brand 'Doubao Auto', set to debut on June 9. The brand combines ByteDance's AI with Seres' manufacturing, focusing on smart cockpits and autonomous driving.
items.why_zh: 豆包汽车的推出是AI公司与传统车企跨界合作的典型案例，将推动智能汽车生态发展。
items.why_en: Doubao Auto exemplifies cross-industry collaboration between AI companies and traditional automakers, driving the smart car ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 华为云 CEO 周跃峰：相比 Tokens 收入和消耗总量，更看重生产力提升
items.title_en: Huawei Cloud CEO: Prioritizes Productivity Gains from Tokens Over Revenue
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，据界面新闻报道，6 月 5 日，华为公司董事、华为云 CEO 周跃峰在接受媒体采访时表示，在当下云厂商都极其重视 MaaS（模型即服务）收入、考核 Tokens 用量的背景下，华为云更看重的是 Tokens 带来的 生产力提升 。 他提到，华为云背后是国产化算力，在国产化算力的能力和供应相对有限的情况下， 华为云不会拿算力规模来和其他厂商做比较 。因此，华为云不太在乎收入总量和 Tokens 的消耗指标，核心目标是发展第二个算力平面，而非情绪价值。 IT之家注意到，在 3 月 20 日举行的华为中国合作伙伴大会 2026 上，华为云 CEO 周跃峰介绍，华为坚持自研盘古大模型开源，目前全尺寸模型已经开源，多模态等模型即将开源。同时开放拥抱 SOTA 模型， 目前 MaaS Tokens 服务接入超过 160 个业界主流模型 ，并在模型后训练提供差异化能力。 周跃峰透露， 华为云还将在今年推出更多行业智能体 ，包括企业级智能体开发平台 AgentArts、数据智能体 DataArts 等。预计在下半年基于 AgentArts 智能体开发平台发布一系列“龙虾”，涉及办公、代码、营销等领域。
items.summary_en: Huawei Cloud CEO Zhou Yuefeng stated that the company prioritizes productivity gains from Tokens over total revenue or consumption. With limited domestic computing power, Huawei Cloud focuses on developing a second computing plane rather than competing on scale. The company open-sources its Pangu models and plans to release more industry agents this year.
items.why_zh: 华为云的战略转向强调AI应用的实际生产力提升，而非单纯的算力规模或收入指标，反映了国产大模型厂商在差异化竞争中的新思路。
items.why_en: Huawei Cloud's shift emphasizes real productivity gains from AI over raw computing power or revenue, signaling a new competitive strategy among domestic AI model providers.

items.title_zh: 谷歌推出 Magenta RealTime 2 本地实时音乐 AI 模型：延迟降低至 1/15
items.title_en: Google Launches Magenta RealTime 2 Music AI with 200ms Latency
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息， 谷歌 Magenta 团队昨日（6 月 4 日）发布 Magenta RealTime 2（MRT2）模型 ，并同步免费放出乐器应用 Jam 以及 DAW 插件 MRT2。 MRT2 定位是可与用户“即兴合奏”的本地实时音乐模型，共有 2 种规模，其一是高质量模型 mrt2_base，参数量为 24 亿；其二是高速模型 mrt2_small，参数量为 2.3 亿。 谷歌表示上述两个版本均针对苹果 Apple Silicon 芯片优化，其中 mrt2_small 可在搭载 M1 及后续芯片的 Apple 电脑上实时运行。 MRT2 最大变化是“低延迟”。上一代 Magenta RealTime 需要 TPU 或高性能 GPU，控制延迟约 3 秒，且以 2 秒音频块为单位响应。 MRT2 改为逐帧生成，每帧 40 毫秒，实际控制延迟约 200 毫秒，较前代降低至 15 分之一。这让模型对输入变化的反应明显更快，更接近真实乐器的演奏体验。 在控制方式上，MRT2 比前代更完整。它支持文本和音频风格提示，也支持 MIDI 音符与鼓开关控制。 模型可持续跟随音符输入变化，还能在 Auto-Strum 模式下自动决定拨弦或起音时机；关闭该模式后，用户还能精确指定音符起始时刻。对于鼓组，系统也支持切换有鼓或无鼓输出，适合多轨编曲场景。 技术层面，MRT2 仍属于…
items.summary_en: Google's Magenta team released Magenta RealTime 2 (MRT2), a local real-time music AI model with two sizes (2.4B and 230M parameters). It reduces latency to 200ms (1/15 of previous) by generating frame-by-frame, optimized for Apple Silicon. Supports text/audio prompts, MIDI, and drum control.
items.why_zh: MRT2将音乐AI的实时交互延迟大幅降低至200毫秒，接近真实乐器演奏体验，为AI辅助音乐创作和表演开辟了新可能。
items.why_en: MRT2 slashes music AI latency to 200ms, approaching real instrument feel, enabling new possibilities for AI-assisted music creation and performance.

items.title_zh: 豆包发布专业版说明，“降低基础功能推动会员”说法不实
items.title_en: Doubao Clarifies: No Reduction of Basic Features to Push Membership
items.summary_zh: 豆包发布专业版说明，“降低基础功能推动会员”说法不实 thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: Doubao issued a statement denying claims that it reduced basic features to promote membership, calling the allegations false. No further details were provided.
items.why_zh: 豆包作为热门AI应用，其收费策略调整引发用户关注，官方澄清有助于稳定用户信任。
items.why_en: As a popular AI app, Doubao's pricing strategy changes drew user concern; the official clarification helps maintain user trust.

items.title_zh: 戴盟机器人完成亿元融资，阿里通义多模态大牛加盟攻关物理世界模型
items.title_en: Daimeng Robotics Secures Hundred-Million-Yuan Funding, Alibaba Tongyi Multimodal Expert Joins to Tackle Physical World Models
items.summary_zh: 戴盟机器人完成亿元融资，阿里通义多模态大牛加盟攻关物理世界模型 智源社区
items.summary_en: Daimeng Robotics has completed a hundred-million-yuan funding round and recruited a senior multimodal expert from Alibaba Tongyi to advance physical world models. The investment will accelerate R&D and commercialization, aiming to enhance robots' autonomous decision-making in complex environments.
items.why_zh: 这标志着资本与顶尖人才共同押注物理世界模型，是具身智能商业化的重要信号。
items.why_en: This signals capital and top talent betting on physical world models, a key step for embodied AI commercialization.

items.title_zh: 融资超500亿！DeepSeek刷新国产大模型估值纪录，马化腾曾毓群丁磊刘强东抢着塞钱
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises Over 50 Billion Yuan, Sets Domestic AI Valuation Record
items.summary_zh: 融资超500亿！DeepSeek刷新国产大模型估值纪录，马化腾曾毓群丁磊刘强东抢着塞钱 智源社区
items.summary_en: DeepSeek raised over 50 billion yuan, setting a new valuation record for domestic AI models. Investors include prominent entrepreneurs like Ma Huateng, Zeng Yuqun, Ding Lei, and Liu Qiangdong, signaling strong market confidence.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的巨额融资和估值新高，凸显国产大模型在资本市场的吸引力，可能加速行业竞争与创新。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive funding and record valuation highlight the appeal of domestic AI models to capital markets, potentially accelerating competition and innovation.

items.title_zh: 华为云发布“行业AI梦工厂”四大专区
items.title_en: Huawei Cloud Launches 'Industry AI Dream Factory' with Four Zones
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，华为云INSPIRE创想者大会在上海开幕。会上，华为云正式提出Agentic Infra新范式，并发布Agentic Infra通智一体化基础设施、新一代模型训推平台、企业级智能体平台等系列Agentic AI新品。大会还宣布正式上线“行业AI梦工厂”智慧医疗、具身智能、智能制造、科学计算四大专区。
items.summary_en: At the Huawei Cloud INSPIRE conference, Huawei Cloud introduced the Agentic Infra paradigm and launched new Agentic AI products, along with the 'Industry AI Dream Factory' featuring four zones: smart healthcare, embodied intelligence, smart manufacturing, and scientific computing. This aims to accelerate AI adoption across industries.
items.why_zh: 华为云通过行业专区降低AI应用门槛，将加速AI在医疗、制造等关键领域的规模化落地。
items.why_en: Huawei Cloud's industry-specific zones lower the barrier for AI adoption, accelerating large-scale deployment in key sectors like healthcare and manufacturing.

items.title_zh: 电动汽车下一代电驱核心技术，我国轴向磁通电机研究取得新突破
items.title_en: China Achieves Breakthrough in Axial Flux Motor Research for Next-Gen EV Drivetrains
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，据央视新闻今日报道，我国高性能轴向磁通电机研究新突破在浙江金华发布。 盘毂动力和中国科学院宁波材料所联合研发推出的专用磁钢与轴向磁通电机的适配度显著提升， 磁能积、高温稳定性、力学强度等多项指标均实现大幅提升 ，进一步放大了轴向磁通电机高效率、高功率 / 扭矩密度、长期服役稳定性的优势，实现了产品极致性能和使用成本之间的平衡，为我国轴向磁通电驱动产业链实现全流程自主创新、大规模市场应用、对标国际顶尖水平提供了关键支撑。 IT之家注：轴向磁通电机也叫圆盘电机或轴向气隙电机，是指电动机中定子和转子之间的气隙是和旋转轴平行，而其经过气隙的磁通也和轴平行。在最早期设计电机时，就已出现这种几何架构，但以往这种电动机非常少见，一直到强力永久磁铁问世，以及直流无刷电动机开始发展，可以有效利用此几何架构的优点，这种电机才又开始出现。 央视新闻表示，近年来，新能源汽车、低空飞行器、人形机器人等领域对电驱动系统极致轻量化、短轴向、高效率的需求爆发， 轴向磁通电机也成为下一代电驱核心技术 ，备受各国关注。轴向磁通电机具备高效、轻量化、高功率密度等突出优势，对比传统电机， 在同等性能下自重减轻约 50%，轴向尺寸缩减 50% ，是培育新质生产力、推动各产业领域转型升级的关键核心技术。目前在全球范围内，包括德国、英国、美国等多个国家和地区都在积极推进该项技术的基础研究、成果转化…
items.summary_en: China has achieved a breakthrough in axial flux motor research, with improved magnetic steel compatibility and performance metrics. These motors are 50% lighter and 50% shorter than traditional ones, making them key for EVs, drones, and humanoid robots. Global efforts are underway to advance this technology.
items.why_zh: 轴向磁通电机是下一代电驱核心技术，其突破将极大推动新能源汽车、低空经济和人形机器人的轻量化与高效化。
items.why_en: Axial flux motors are a next-gen drivetrain core technology; this breakthrough will significantly boost lightweighting and efficiency in EVs, low-altitude economy, and humanoid robots.

items.title_zh: 腾讯云TokenHub：连续多月翻倍，日Token消耗量跃升至5万亿
items.title_en: Tencent Cloud TokenHub: Daily Token Consumption Surges to 5 Trillion, Doubling Monthly
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，在今天举行的腾讯云AI产业应用大会上，腾讯云总经理、TokenHub负责人高航透露，腾讯云大模型服务平台TokenHub上线3个月，保持每月翻倍的增长态势，目前日Token消耗量已突破5万亿。
items.summary_en: Tencent Cloud's TokenHub has seen daily token consumption exceed 5 trillion, doubling every month since launch three months ago. This reflects surging enterprise demand for AI model services, strengthening Tencent Cloud's AI infrastructure position.
items.why_zh: TokenHub的爆发式增长印证了企业级大模型应用的强劲需求，是AI产业落地的风向标。
items.why_en: TokenHub's explosive growth confirms strong enterprise demand for large model services, serving as a barometer for AI industry adoption.

items.title_zh: 秘密LLM代理在Reddit辩论中的说服策略：一项被终止的实地实验分析
items.title_en: How Far Did They Go? The Persuasive Tactics of Covert LLM Agents in a Discontinued Field Experiment
items.summary_zh: 一项研究分析了Reddit r/ChangeMyView子版块中一个被公开的、已终止的实地实验数据集。该实验由未知的外部研究人员进行，因伦理争议而停止，涉及未公开的AI生成账户与用户进行实时辩论。在公开披露后，Reddit授权版主发布了AI生成评论的存档，为研究大语言模型在身份丰富的讨论论坛中如何运作提供了罕见机会。研究对LLM代理的说服策略进行了结构化分析，揭示了其在辩论中的行为模式。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05256v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study analyzes a publicly released dataset from a discontinued field experiment on Reddit's r/ChangeMyView. The intervention, conducted by unknown, external researchers and halted following ethical backlash, involved undisclosed AI-generated accounts engaging users in live debate. After public disclosure, Reddit authorized moderators to release an archive of the AI-generated comments, creating a rare opportunity to examine how large language models operated in an identity-rich deliberative forum without disclosure. We conduct a structured co…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM在未公开身份情况下进行说服的潜在风险，对AI伦理和在线讨论透明度具有重要警示。
items.why_en: This study highlights risks of covert LLM persuasion, underscoring ethical concerns and the need for transparency in online discourse.

items.title_zh: 我懂你的梗，即使它今天才出现：通过开放世界知识获取理解演变中的模因
items.title_en: I Know What You Meme, Even If it Emerged Today: Understanding Evolving Memes through Open-World Knowledge Acquisition
items.summary_zh: 多模态模因是动态的，通常需要最新的背景知识来解读。现有方法往往忽略此类知识，或依赖预训练模型的固定参数知识，这些知识可能不完整、过时或无法用于新兴模因。本文提出Query Retrieve Conclude（QRC）框架，这是一个零样本方法，能够识别缺失知识、检索开放网络证据，并综合基于证据的背景知识，用于模因理解和检测。研究还引入了一个精心策划的模因理解基准，以评估该方法在动态模因环境中的有效性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05316v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal memes are dynamic and often require up to date background knowledge for interpretation. Existing methods often overlook such knowledge or rely on fixed parametric knowledge of pretrained models that may be incomplete, outdated, or unavailable for emerging memes. We introduce Query Retrieve Conclude, a zero shot framework that identifies missing knowledge, retrieves open web evidence, and synthesizes evidence grounded background knowledge for meme understanding and detection. We also introduce a curated meme understanding benchmark of r…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了AI理解动态文化模因的难题，对社交媒体分析和内容审核具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This framework addresses the challenge of AI understanding dynamic cultural memes, valuable for social media analysis and content moderation.

items.title_zh: WorldFly：基于世界模型的视觉-语言-动作无人机导航模型
items.title_en: WorldFly: A World-Model-Based Vision-Language-Action Model for UAV Navigation
items.summary_zh: 端到端视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在无人机导航中展现出潜力，但现有方法通常依赖历史观测直接预测动作，在密集城市环境中常因严重遮挡和急转弯导致视角剧烈变化而表现不佳。本文认为，世界模型固有的“想象”未来状态的能力对于在这种部分可观测性下做出稳健决策至关重要。为此，研究构建了一个具有挑战性的城市峡谷穿越基准，并提出了WorldFly模型，该模型结合世界模型与VLA，显著提升了无人机在复杂城市环境中的导航性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06147v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: End-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promise in UAV navigation. However, existing approaches typically rely on historical observations to directly predict actions, often struggling in dense urban environments where severe occlusions and sharp turns result in drastic viewpoint transitions. We argue that the ability to "imagine" future states -- inherent in World Models -- is critical for robust decision-making under such partial observability. To address this, we construct a challenging Urban Canyon Traversal Benchmark, specif…
items.why_zh: WorldFly通过世界模型增强无人机在复杂环境中的导航能力，对城市低空物流和巡检等应用意义重大。
items.why_en: WorldFly enhances UAV navigation in complex environments via world models, crucial for urban logistics and inspection applications.

items.title_zh: 评估用于计算机网络配置修复的智能体系统
items.title_en: Evaluating Agentic Configuration Repair for Computer Networks
items.summary_zh: 计算机网络中的错误配置仍然是导致重大互联网中断的主要原因。研究正转向利用大语言模型来自动化配置修复这一复杂且易出错的任务。然而，即使是最先进的模型也无法解决大规模复杂场景中的错误配置，并且常常引入新错误。本文对开源和闭源LLM进行了基准测试，并辅以形式化网络验证和上下文检索工具。结果表明，智能体架构在修复效率上优于基础LLM，为网络自动化运维提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06212v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Misconfigurations in computer networks remain a major source of critical Internet outages. Research is turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the complex, error-prone task of network configuration. However, even state-of-the-art models fail to resolve misconfigurations in large-scale, complex scenarios and often introduce new errors. In this work, we benchmark open- and closed-source LLMs augmented with formal network verification and context retrieval tools. We demonstrate that agentic architectures outperform base LLMs in repair ef…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了智能体架构在自动化网络运维中的潜力，有望减少因配置错误导致的网络中断。
items.why_en: This study demonstrates the potential of agentic architectures for automated network operations, potentially reducing outages caused by misconfigurations.

items.title_zh: Benchmark Agent：全自主基准构建系统
items.title_en: Benchmark Everything Everywhere All at Once
items.summary_zh: 基准测试对于评估和推进大语言模型（LLM）和多模态大语言模型（MLLM）至关重要，但传统基准构建劳动密集且难以复用，存在可持续性和可扩展性问题。此外，现有基准发布后往往迅速达到性能饱和，无法有效区分最先进模型。为此，研究人员提出了Benchmark Agent，一个完全自主的智能体系统，用于自动化基准构建。该系统旨在解决上述挑战，提高基准测试的效率和区分度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06462v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Benchmarks are fundamental for evaluating and advancing LLMs and MLLMs by providing standardized and explicit measures of performance. However, their construction is labor-intensive and hard to reuse, raising concerns about sustainability and scalability. Moreover, existing benchmarks often quickly reach performance saturation after their release, resulting in insufficient discrimination among state-of-the-art models. To address these challenges, we introduce Benchmark Agent, a fully autonomous agentic system designed for benchmark building. Our…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了一种自动化基准构建方法，有望解决当前基准测试的可持续性和区分度问题。
items.why_en: This work proposes an autonomous benchmark building system that could address sustainability and discrimination issues in current benchmarks.

items.title_zh: MCBench：全模态大语言模型的多情境安全评估基准
items.title_en: MCBench: A Multicontext Safety Assessment Benchmark for Omni Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 现有的多模态安全基准仅关注视觉输入，无法评估处理视觉、音频和文本的全模态大语言模型（Omni LLM）。为此，研究者推出了MCBench，包含1196个场景，覆盖四个安全类别，需要整合多种模态进行准确安全评估。每个不安全场景都配有一个最小差异的安全对照场景，以评估模型的敏感性。对最先进模型的评估揭示了显著挑战，全模态LLM在应对微妙或非物理风险时存在困难。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05177v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing multimodal safety benchmarks focus solely on visual inputs and cannot assess Omni Large Language Models (LLMs) that process vision, audio, and text. We introduce MCBench, a benchmark with 1196 scenarios spanning four safety categories that require integrating multiple modalities for accurate safety assessment. Each unsafe scenario is paired with a minimally different safe counterpart to assess model sensitivity. Our evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal significant challenges. Omni LLMs struggle with subtle or non-physical risk…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了全模态大语言模型安全评估的空白，对确保模型在多模态环境下的安全性至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in safety evaluation for Omni LLMs, crucial for ensuring model safety in multimodal contexts.

items.title_zh: 前沿计算机使用智能体的领域条件安全：793集浏览器基准与重现性审计
items.title_en: Domain-Conditioned Safety in Frontier Computer-Using Agents: A 793-Episode Browser Benchmark, a Coding-Domain Cross-Reference, and a Reproducibility Audit of Recent Red-Teaming
items.summary_zh: 近期关于计算机使用智能体（CUA）的红队测试论文报告提示注入攻击成功率（ASR）高达42-98%，但这些数字集中在已退役模型和每篇论文中最脆弱的模型上。本研究通过手工制作的模板重现这些技术，测试当前前沿CUA（如Claude Sonnet 4.6和GPT-5.4）的鲁棒性。研究者发布了CUA-HandCrafted基准，包含793个场景、24个多步骤网络任务、56个攻击模板、8个攻击家族和4种系统提示配置。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05233v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent computer-using-agent (CUA) red-teaming papers report prompt-injection attack success rates (ASR) of 42-98%, but these headline numbers cluster on retired models and on the most-vulnerable model in each paper's panel. We ask whether those techniques, reproduced as hand-crafted templates, still work against current frontier CUAs. We release CUA-HandCrafted, a public benchmark of 793 episodes spanning 24 multi-step web tasks, 56 attack templates, 8 attack families, and 4 system-prompt configurations. Against Claude Sonnet 4.6 and GPT-5.4 we…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过重现性审计揭示了前沿计算机使用智能体对提示注入攻击的实际脆弱性，对安全部署具有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This reproducibility audit reveals the actual vulnerability of frontier computer-using agents to prompt injection, informing safe deployment.

items.title_zh: CausalPOI：基于时空图因果建模的冷启动POI签到预测
items.title_en: CausalPOI: Spatio-Temporal Graph-Based Causal Modeling for Cold-Start POI Check-in Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 随着城市环境快速演变，准确建模兴趣点（POI）的动态行为对于数据驱动的城市规划和商业决策至关重要。现有方法多依赖基于邻近度的图和相关性驱动建模，忽略了POI之间的功能依赖关系，无法捕捉城市干预的因果效应。本文提出CausalPOI，一种基于时空图因果建模的新方法，专门解决冷启动POI签到预测问题，通过引入因果结构来提升预测准确性和可解释性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05413v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As urban environments continue to evolve rapidly, accurately modeling the dynamic behaviour of Points of Interest is essential for supporting data-driven urban planning and commercial decision-making. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal graph learning have improved POI forecasting, most methods rely on proximity-based graphs and correlation-driven modeling, which overlook the functional dependencies between POIs and fail to capture the causal effects of urban interventions. In this paper, we introduce a novel research problem -- cold-s…
items.why_zh: 该研究将因果建模引入POI预测，有望提升城市动态建模的准确性和可解释性，对智慧城市应用具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work introduces causal modeling to POI forecasting, potentially improving accuracy and interpretability for smart city applications.

items.title_zh: TensorBench：基于编译器的张量框架编码智能体基准
items.title_en: TensorBench: Benchmarking Coding Agents on a Compiler-Based Tensor Framework
items.summary_zh: 仓库级编码基准在任务难度和评估可靠性之间存在权衡：挑战前沿模型的任务通常涉及大型代码库且测试覆盖不全，而人工评审难以扩展。为此，研究者推出了TensorBench，一个包含199个特征添加和重构任务的基准，基于开源编译器张量框架（扩展PyTorch以支持稠密和稀疏张量）。任务涵盖新稀疏格式、密集优化、IR变换、调度器更改等，旨在评估编码智能体在复杂框架上的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05570v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Repository-level coding benchmarks face a trade-off between task difficulty and evaluation reliability: tasks that challenge frontier models often involve large codebases with incomplete test coverage, while human review does not scale. We introduce TensorBench, a benchmark of 199 feature-addition and refactoring tasks on an open-source compiler-based tensor framework that extends PyTorch with first-class support for dense and sparse tensors. Tasks cover new sparse formats, dense optimization passes, IR transformations, scheduler changes, runti…
items.why_zh: 该基准为评估编码智能体在真实复杂框架上的能力提供了可靠测试集，有助于推动自动化代码生成的发展。
items.why_en: This benchmark offers a reliable test set for evaluating coding agents on real-world complex frameworks, advancing automated code generation.

items.title_zh: 数据流控制：AI智能体的数据安全策略
items.title_en: Data Flow Control: Data Safety Policies for AI Agents
items.summary_zh: AI智能体越来越多地代表用户生成SQL、编排管道和自动化数据分析。虽然近期工作提高了查询正确性，但正确性不等于安全性。一个语义正确的查询可能违反监管、隐私或业务约束，这些约束规定了数据如何组合和发布。本文认为强制执行此类约束本质上是数据基础设施问题，并提出了数据流控制（DFC）框架，用于声明式地指定和保证元组级数据流上的策略执行。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05679v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agents increasingly generate SQL, orchestrate pipelines, and automate data analysis on behalf of users. While recent work improves query correctness, correctness is not safety. A query may be semantically valid yet violate regulatory, privacy, or business constraints that govern how data may be combined and released. We argue that enforcing such constraints is fundamentally a data infrastructure problem. This paper introduces Data Flow Control (DFC), a framework to declaratively specify and guarantee policy enforcement over tuple-level data flo…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了AI智能体在数据处理中的安全合规问题，对保障数据隐私和法规遵从至关重要。
items.why_en: This framework addresses safety compliance in AI agent data processing, crucial for data privacy and regulatory adherence.

items.title_zh: 莱比锡基准：数学研究级问题集
items.title_en: Benchmarks in Leipzig
items.summary_zh: 2026年4月1日至5月15日，49位数学家汇编了一个包含已知答案的研究级数学问题数据集。大部分工作在莱比锡马克斯·普朗克数学科学研究所为期3天的研讨会上完成，35人参与。最终收集了100个问题。评估分三个阶段：首先由五个最先进LLM单次尝试，然后对其中三个模型进行每模型20次运行评估，最后进行进一步分析。该基准旨在测试LLM在高级数学推理方面的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05818v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Between April 1 and May 15, 2026, a group of 49 mathematicians compiled a dataset of research-level mathematics questions with known answers. Most of the work was done during the 3-day workshop *Benchmarks in Leipzig* with 35 participants at the Max Planck Institute for Mathematics in the Sciences in Leipzig, Germany. We present the resulting collection of 100 questions. We evaluated these questions in three stages: a single attempt by five state-of-the-art LLMs, followed by a 20-runs-per-model evaluation with three of these models, and finally…
items.why_zh: 该基准由数学家精心设计，用于评估LLM在高级数学推理方面的能力，对衡量AI的科学推理水平具有独特价值。
items.why_en: This mathematician-curated benchmark evaluates LLMs on advanced mathematical reasoning, uniquely valuable for assessing AI scientific reasoning.

items.title_zh: CausalPhys：视觉语言模型因果物理推理基准
items.title_en: Causal Scaffolding for Physical Reasoning: A Benchmark for Causally-Informed Physical World Understanding in VLMs
items.summary_zh: 理解和推理物理世界是智能行为的基础，但最先进的视觉语言模型（VLM）在因果物理推理上仍然失败，常常给出看似合理但错误的答案。为此，研究者推出了CausalPhys，一个包含3000多个精心策划的视频和图像问题的基准，涵盖感知、预期、干预和目标导向四个领域。每个问题都配有专家标注的因果图，捕捉对象-属性-事件依赖关系，旨在系统评估VLM的因果物理理解能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05966v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding and reasoning about the physical world is the foundation of intelligent behavior, yet state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) still fail at causal physical reasoning, often producing plausible but incorrect answers. To address this gap, we introduce CausalPhys, a benchmark of over 3,000 carefully curated video- and image-based questions spanning four domains: Perception, Anticipation, Intervention, and Goal Orientation. Each question is paired with an expert-annotated causal graph capturing object-attribute-event dependenci…
items.why_zh: 该基准系统评估VLM的因果物理推理能力，揭示了当前模型的不足，对推动具身智能和物理世界理解研究至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark systematically evaluates causal physical reasoning in VLMs, revealing shortcomings critical for embodied AI and physical world understanding.

items.title_zh: 利用Rashomon集进行蜕变测试：机器学习中的解释忠实度
items.title_en: Metamorphic Testing with the Rashomon Set: Explanation Faithfulness in Machine Learning
items.summary_zh: 多个机器学习模型在相同任务上可能达到近乎相同的预测性能，但提供截然不同的基于特征的解释，这被称为（可解释）机器学习的Rashomon效应，引发了对解释可信度的质疑。本文提出一个基于蜕变测试的框架，通过探索事后解释方法归因的特征重要性，在无需真实标签的情况下评估解释忠实度。该框架定义了五种蜕变关系来形式化预期行为，从而判断解释是否可靠。这项工作为评估模型解释的可靠性提供了新方法，有助于提升机器学习系统的可信度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06056v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multiple machine learning models can achieve near-equivalent predictive performance on the same task, yet provide divergent feature-based explanations. This is called the Rashomon effect of (explainable) machine learning, and it raises the question of which explanations, if any, are trustworthy. We propose a framework based on metamorphic testing that assesses explanation faithfulness without requiring ground-truth labels by exploring attributed feature importance from post-hoc explanation methods. Five metamorphic relations formalize expected…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了机器学习模型解释不一致的关键问题，为评估解释可靠性提供了无监督方法。
items.why_en: This work addresses the critical issue of inconsistent explanations in ML models, offering an unsupervised method to assess explanation reliability.

items.title_zh: 开源版面检测模型在机构文档数据快照提取中的基准测试
items.title_en: Benchmarking Open-Source Layout Detection Models for Data Snapshot Extraction from Institutional Documents
items.summary_zh: 机构文档中的图表包含大量运营和分析信息，但当前提取方法通常将图表视为统一相关的文档对象，而非有语义意义的分析产物。本文引入了一个基准数据集和评估框架，用于“数据快照提取”任务，即识别和定位文档中具有语义意义的图表。该工作旨在推动从机构文档中自动提取结构化数据，提升信息利用效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06242v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Institutional documents contain substantial amounts of operational and analytical information embedded within figures and tables. Current approaches for extracting visual content from documents are largely built around generic document layout analysis, where figures and tables are treated as uniformly relevant document objects rather than semantically meaningful analytical artifacts. In this work, we introduce a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for \textit{data snapshot extraction}, the task of identifying and localizing semantically…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了机构文档中语义图表提取的评估空白，有助于自动化数据分析。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating semantic chart extraction from institutional documents, aiding automated data analysis.

items.title_zh: DPBench：多智能体LLM在资源竞争下的协调结构性决定因素
items.title_en: DPBench: Structural Determinants of Multi-Agent LLM Coordination Under Simultaneous Resource Contention
items.summary_zh: 现有基准通常在固定协议下衡量多智能体系统的任务成功率，但未刻画协调成功或失败的结构性条件。本文提出DPBench，基于哲学家就餐问题构建可控测试平台，独立变化行动协议、通信结构和群体规模。评估了GPT-5.2、Claude Opus 4.5、Grok 4.1、Gemini 2.5 Flash等六种智能体，揭示了不同结构因素对协调的影响。该工作为理解大语言模型多智能体系统的协调机制提供了系统化基准。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.13255v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present DPBench, a benchmark for evaluating coordination in multi-agent systems built from large language models. Existing benchmarks measure task-level success under a fixed protocol; the structural conditions under which coordination succeeds or fails at all have not been characterised. DPBench adapts the Dining Philosophers problem into a controlled testbed where the action protocol, the communication structure, and the group size each vary independently. We evaluate six agents: GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, Grok 4.1, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Llam…
items.why_zh: 该基准系统性地揭示了多智能体LLM协调失败的结构性原因，对设计可靠的多智能体系统至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark systematically reveals structural causes of coordination failure in multi-agent LLM systems, crucial for designing reliable systems.

items.title_zh: 工业化预测驱动推断：用于可靠GenAI和智能体系统评估的GLIDE库
items.title_en: Industrializing Prediction-Powered Inference: The GLIDE Library for Reliable GenAI and Agentic Systems Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 智能体系统的可靠评估需要无偏估计和有效的不确定性度量，但标准实践在昂贵的人工标注和有偏的LLM评判代理之间权衡。预测驱动推断（PPI）结合两者，提供去偏估计和有效置信区间，但其各种方法分散在不同论文中。本文介绍GLIDE，一个开源Python库，统一了最先进的PPI估计器（PPI++、分层PPI、预测-去偏及其分层变体等），为生成式AI和智能体系统评估提供工业化解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.31278v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Reliable evaluation of agentic systems requires unbiased estimates with valid uncertainty, but standard practice navigates between costly human annotation and biased LLM-as-judge proxies. Prediction-powered inference (PPI) combines both into debiased estimates with valid confidence intervals, yet its various methods remain scattered across papers under partial implementations. We introduce GLIDE, an open-source Python library that unifies state-of-the-art PPI estimators (PPI++, Stratified PPI, Predict-Then-Debias and its stratified variants,…
items.why_zh: GLIDE将分散的PPI方法整合为统一库，为AI系统评估提供了实用且可靠的工业化工具。
items.why_en: GLIDE consolidates scattered PPI methods into a unified library, providing a practical and reliable industrial tool for AI system evaluation.

items.title_zh: 开源AI中的开放协作图谱：14个开放大语言模型项目的实践、动机与治理
items.title_en: A Cartography of Open Collaboration in Open Source AI: Mapping Practices, Motivations, and Governance in 14 Open Large Language Model Projects
items.summary_zh: 开放大语言模型（LLM）的激增正在培育一个充满活力的人工智能生态系统。然而，开放LLM项目的协作方式（包括发布前后）尚未得到系统研究，限制了对项目发起、组织和治理的理解。本文通过对14个开放LLM项目的开发与复用生命周期进行探索性分析，绘制了开放协作的实践、动机与治理模式。该研究为理解开放AI生态系统的运作机制提供了重要见解。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2509.25397v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The proliferation of open large language models (LLMs) is fostering a vibrant ecosystem in artificial intelligence (AI). However, the methods of collaboration used to develop open LLMs, both before and after their public release, have not yet been systematically studied, limiting our understanding of how open LLM projects are initiated, organised, and governed, as well as the opportunities to further foster this ecosystem. We address this gap through an exploratory analysis of open collaboration throughout the development and reuse life…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统描绘了开放LLM项目的协作模式，对促进开源AI生态健康发展具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This study provides the first systematic mapping of collaboration patterns in open LLM projects, guiding the healthy development of the open-source AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Brain-CLIPLM：面向EEG到文本解码的语义压缩
items.title_en: Brain-CLIPLM: Semantic Compression for EEG-to-Text Decoding
items.summary_zh: 从非侵入性脑电图（EEG）解码自然语言受限于低信噪比和有限信息带宽。本文提出语义压缩假说：非侵入性EEG可能保留可恢复的语义锚点，而非完整的词汇句法形式。基于此，引入Brain-CLIPLM方法，利用CLIP和语言模型实现从EEG信号到文本的语义级解码。实验表明，该方法在语义恢复方面优于传统方法，为脑机接口中的语言解码提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.16370v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Decoding natural language from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains constrained by low signal-to-noise ratio and limited information bandwidth. This raises a central question: can sentence-level language be reliably recovered from such signals? Under realistic information constraints, this direct-recovery assumption may be too strong. We introduce a semantic compression hypothesis: non-invasive EEG may preserve recoverable semantic anchors rather than the full lexical--syntactic form of a sentence. From this perspective, di…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了语义压缩假说，为低信噪比下的EEG语言解码提供了可行方向。
items.why_en: This work proposes the semantic compression hypothesis, offering a feasible direction for EEG language decoding under low signal-to-noise conditions.

items.title_zh: 前沿滞后：学术AI评估中能力误述的文献计量审计
items.title_en: Frontier Lag: A Bibliometric Audit of Capability Misrepresentation in Academic AI Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 应用领域的大语言模型能力评估读者希望了解AI系统当前的能力，但相关文献回答的是另一个问题：较旧、较便宜、较少提示的模型在数月或数年前能做什么（例如2026年的论文评估GPT-3.5或GPT-4零样本，而前沿已是GPT-5.5 Pro和Claude Opus 4.7等推理型工具使用系统）。这些评估常以稀疏配置细节报告，并抽象为关于“AI”的声明，通过引用和媒体传播。本文通过文献计量审计揭示了这种“前沿滞后”现象，指出学术评估可能系统性地低估或误述AI能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.04135v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Readers of applied-domain LLM capability evaluations want to know what AI systems can currently do. That literature answers a related, but consequentially different, question: what older, cheaper, less-elicited models could do months or years earlier (a 2026 paper evaluating GPT-3.5 or GPT-4 zero-shot, say, against a frontier of reasoning-capable, tool-using systems like GPT-5.5 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7), often reported with sparse configuration details and abstracted upward into claims about "AI" that propagate through citations, media,…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了学术AI评估中普遍存在的“前沿滞后”问题，提醒读者注意能力声明的时效性偏差。
items.why_en: This study reveals the widespread 'frontier lag' in academic AI evaluations, alerting readers to temporal biases in capability claims.

items.title_zh: Toto 2.0：时间序列预测进入规模化时代
items.title_en: Toto 2.0: Time Series Forecasting Enters the Scaling Era
items.summary_zh: 本文证明时间序列基础模型具有可扩展性：单一训练方案可从4M参数扩展到2.5B参数，并持续提升预测质量。发布Toto 2.0系列，包含五个开源权重预测模型，在三个基准（BOOM、GIFT-Eval、TIME）上达到新最优水平。该工作表明时间序列预测正进入规模化时代，大模型在时序预测中同样有效。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.20119v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We show that time series foundation models scale: a single training recipe produces reliable forecast-quality improvements from 4M to 2.5B parameters. We release Toto 2.0, a family of five open-weights forecasting models trained under this recipe. The Toto 2.0 family sets a new state of the art on three forecasting benchmarks: BOOM, our observability benchmark; GIFT-Eval, the standard general-purpose benchmark; and the recent contamination-resistant TIME benchmark. This report describes our experimental results and details the design de…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次证明时间序列基础模型可规模化扩展，为时序预测领域的大模型应用奠定了基础。
items.why_en: This work first demonstrates that time series foundation models scale, laying the foundation for large models in time series forecasting.

items.title_zh: 选择性发布DPSGD中的子采样隐私放大效应再探讨
items.title_en: Revisiting Privacy Amplification by Subsampling in Selective Release DPSGD
items.summary_zh: 机器学习对敏感数据的依赖催生了差分隐私随机梯度下降（DPSGD）等隐私保护技术。然而，DPSGD因梯度裁剪和噪声注入而面临严重的效用下降和收敛缓慢问题。先前的工作试图从不同角度改进DPSGD，其中差分隐私选择性更新与发布（DPSUR）算法取得了显著的模型效用。然而，DPSUR中的隐私核算忽略了采样概率的变化，可能导致隐私保证不准确。本文重新审视了选择性发布场景下的子采样隐私放大效应，提出了更精确的隐私分析方法。该研究对于在保护隐私的同时保持模型性能具有重要意义。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.04384v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine learning's reliance on sensitive data necessitates privacy-preserving techniques like Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DPSGD). However, DPSGD suffers from substantial utility degradation and slow convergence due to gradient clipping and noise injection. Prior works have attempted to improve DPSGD from various perspectives; notably, the Differentially Private Selective Update and Release (DPSUR) algorithm has achieved remarkable model utility. However, the privacy accounting in DPSUR overlooks the variation in sampling p…
items.why_zh: 该研究修正了DPSUR中隐私核算的缺陷，有助于在隐私保护机器学习中实现更好的效用-隐私权衡。
items.why_en: This work corrects a flaw in privacy accounting for DPSUR, enabling better utility-privacy trade-offs in privacy-preserving machine learning.

items.title_zh: U-Net加速的气候适应性城市布局质量多样性优化
items.title_en: U-Net-Accelerated Quality-Diversity Optimization for Climate-Adaptive Urban Layouts
items.summary_zh: 优化城市布局以适应气候变化需要在建筑密度和冷空气通风之间取得平衡。由于基于物理的气候模拟计算成本高昂，规划者通常只能评估少于十种手动设计方案。质量多样性（QD）算法提供了一种系统探索设计空间的方法，但需要代理模型才能实用。本文用空间深度学习代理（U-Net）替代了缓慢的监管物理模拟器，并将其嵌入离线MAP-Elites循环中。系统比较表明，该方法能高效生成多样化的气候适应性布局，为城市规划提供有力工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.04658v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Optimizing urban layouts for climate adaptation requires balancing building density with cold-air ventilation. Because physics-based climate simulations are computationally expensive, planners typically evaluate fewer than ten manual designs. \gls{qd} algorithms offer a way to systematically illuminate the design space, but they require surrogate models to be practical. In this paper, we replace a slow, regulatory physics simulator with a spatial deep-learning surrogate (U-Net) inside an offline MAP-Elites loop. We systematically compare this s…
items.why_zh: 该研究将深度学习代理与质量多样性优化结合，大幅降低了气候适应性城市规划的计算成本，具有实际应用价值。
items.why_en: This work combines deep learning surrogates with quality-diversity optimization to drastically reduce computational cost for climate-adaptive urban planning, offering practical utility.

items.title_zh: 基于视觉Transformer的开源两阶段细粒度车辆分类流水线
items.title_en: An Open-Source Two-Stage Computer Vision Pipeline for Fine-Grained Vehicle Classification using Vision Transformers
items.summary_zh: 车辆车身类型是超车碰撞中骑行者受伤严重程度的重要决定因素，但目前缺乏从自然道路视频中自动将车辆分类为与伤害风险相关类别的工具。标准目标检测基准仅提供粗略的车辆标签（轿车、卡车、公交车、摩托车），而现有的细粒度识别系统在受控图像上训练，缺乏跨记录站点的部署鲁棒性评估。本文提出一个开源的两阶段计算机视觉流水线，利用视觉Transformer实现细粒度车辆分类。该系统在真实道路视频上进行了评估，展示了良好的鲁棒性和准确性，有助于交通安全研究。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05149v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vehicle body type is a significant determinant of cyclist injury severity in overtaking crashes, yet automated tools for classifying vehicles into injury-risk-relevant categories from naturalistic roadway video do not exist in the open literature. Standard object detection benchmarks provide only coarse vehicle labels (car, truck, bus, motorcycle), while existing fine-grained recognition systems are trained on controlled imagery and lack evaluation for deployment robustness across recording sites. This paper presents an open-source two-stage co…
items.why_zh: 该工作填补了从自然道路视频中自动识别细粒度车辆类型的空白，对提升骑行者安全研究具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work fills a gap in automated fine-grained vehicle classification from naturalistic video, crucial for cyclist safety research.

items.title_zh: Lethe：面向联邦遗忘中持久知识擦除的原则性双流更新
items.title_en: \textsc{Lethe}: Principled Dual-Stream Update for Persistent Knowledge Erasure in Federated Unlearning
items.summary_zh: 联邦遗忘旨在从全局模型中擦除知识。现有研究通常假设遗忘后联邦协作终止，忽略了删除请求完成后剩余客户端继续训练的现实场景。本文发现了一个关键失败模式——知识重现，即仅对保留数据继续训练就能在几轮内重新激活已遗忘的知识。实验表明，许多最先进的联邦遗忘方法都存在此问题。为此，作者提出了Lethe，一种原则性的双流更新方法，通过分离遗忘和保留数据的更新流来防止知识重现。该工作为联邦遗忘的持久性提供了理论保障。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.22601v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Federated unlearning (FU) aims to erase knowledge from a global model. Existing studies commonly assume that federated collaboration terminates after unlearning, overlooking a deployment-realistic scenario where training continues on the remaining clients after deletion requests are fulfilled. In this work, we identify a critical failure mode, termed knowledge resurfacing, revealing that continued training on retained data alone can reactivate unlearned knowledge in a few rounds. Empirically, we demonstrate that many state-of-the-art FU metho…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了联邦遗忘中知识重现的关键问题，并提供了解决方案，对实际部署中的隐私合规至关重要。
items.why_en: This work uncovers and solves the knowledge resurfacing problem in federated unlearning, critical for privacy compliance in real-world deployments.

items.title_zh: ALMAB-DC：结合主动学习、多臂老虎机和分布式计算的序列实验设计与黑箱优化
items.title_en: ALMAB-DC: Active Learning, Multi-Armed Bandits, and Distributed Computing for Sequential Experimental Design and Black-Box Optimization
items.summary_zh: 在昂贵且无梯度的目标函数下进行序列实验设计是计算统计学的核心挑战：评估预算严格受限，必须从每次观测中高效提取信息。本文提出ALMAB-DC，一种基于高斯过程的序列设计框架，结合了主动学习、多臂老虎机和分布式异步计算。高斯过程代理模型通过不确定性感知的采集函数识别信息量大的查询点；上置信界（UCB）策略平衡探索与利用；分布式计算加速实验进程。该方法在多个基准测试中表现出色，显著降低了昂贵实验的评估成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.21180v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Sequential experimental design under expensive, gradient-free objectives is a central challenge in computational statistics: evaluation budgets are tightly constrained and information must be extracted efficiently from each observation. We propose \textbf{ALMAB-DC}, a GP-based sequential design framework combining active learning, multi-armed bandits (MAB), and distributed asynchronous computing for expensive black-box experimentation. A Gaussian process surrogate with uncertainty-aware acquisition identifies informative query points; a UCB o…
items.why_zh: 该框架为昂贵黑箱优化提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，在科学实验和工程设计中具有广泛应用前景。
items.why_en: This framework offers an efficient and scalable solution for expensive black-box optimization, with broad applications in scientific experiments and engineering design.

items.title_zh: 学会评估：基于元学习的未标注数据上经济高效模型评估
items.title_en: Learning to Evaluate: Cost-Effective Model Evaluation on Unlabeled Data with Meta-Learning
items.summary_zh: 机器学习的快速发展导致模型生态系统空前扩张，使得评估新发布模型在未见未标注数据上的可靠性变得越来越困难。现有评估流程通常依赖昂贵的标注、重复微调或无法泛化到新模型的假设。本文提出MetaEvaluator，一个经济高效、模型无关的框架，用于快速、无标签地评估跨不同架构和模态的未见模型。MetaEvaluator通过元学习从历史评估中学习，无需标注即可预测模型性能。实验表明，该方法在多种任务上显著降低了评估成本，同时保持高准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23595v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The rapid advancement of machine learning has led to an unprecedented expansion of model ecosystems, making it increasingly difficult to assess the reliability of newly released models on unseen and unlabeled data. Existing evaluation pipelines typically rely on costly annotation, repeated fine-tuning, or assumptions that do not generalize well to new models. We introduce MetaEvaluator, a cost-effective, model-agnostic framework for fast, label-free evaluation of unseen models across diverse architectures and modalities. MetaEvaluator meta-le…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了模型生态系统扩张带来的评估瓶颈，为无标签场景下的模型可靠性评估提供了实用方案。
items.why_en: This work addresses the evaluation bottleneck in the expanding model ecosystem, offering a practical solution for assessing model reliability without labels.

items.title_zh: LoopFM：从基础模型历史表示中学习推荐
items.title_en: LoopFM: Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of Foundation Model for Recommendation
items.summary_zh: 知识蒸馏将大型基础模型（FM）的单个标量预测迁移到紧凑的垂直模型（VM），但存在迁移率递减的问题——单个标量无法传达大型FM学习的丰富中间知识。为解决这一瓶颈，本文提出LoopFM，通过将FM中间嵌入结构化为输入特征（如用户历史）来打开高带宽传输通道。该方法允许VM直接利用FM的中间表示，显著提升了知识迁移效率。实验表明，LoopFM在多个推荐任务上优于传统蒸馏方法，为高效模型压缩提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29280v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers a single scalar prediction from a large foundation model (FM) to compact vertical models (VMs), suffering from diminishing transfer ratio -- the fraction of FM improvement captured by the VM -- as a single scalar cannot convey the rich intermediate knowledge that larger FMs learn. To address this bottleneck, we propose LoopFM (Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of FM), a framework that opens a high-bandwidth transfer channel by structuring FM intermediate embeddings as input features (e.g., user his…
items.why_zh: 该研究突破了知识蒸馏中信息瓶颈，为高效利用大型模型知识提供了新范式，对推荐系统等应用有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work breaks the information bottleneck in knowledge distillation, offering a new paradigm for leveraging large model knowledge efficiently, valuable for recommendation systems.

items.title_zh: 宾夕法尼亚大学兽医学院启动AI驱动的牲畜行为实验室
items.title_en: Penn Vet launches AI-powered livestock behavior lab
items.summary_zh: 宾夕法尼亚大学兽医学院宣布成立一个由人工智能驱动的牲畜行为实验室。该实验室将利用AI技术监测和分析牲畜行为，旨在改善动物福利和生产效率。通过计算机视觉和机器学习，实验室能够实时追踪牲畜的活动、社交互动和健康状况，为养殖者提供数据驱动的管理建议。这一举措标志着AI在农业领域的进一步应用，有望推动精准畜牧业的发展。
items.summary_en: Penn Vet launches AI-powered livestock behavior lab The Daily Pennsylvanian
items.why_zh: 该实验室将AI应用于畜牧业，有助于提升动物福利和生产效率，是精准农业的重要进展。
items.why_en: This lab applies AI to livestock management, enhancing animal welfare and productivity, marking a significant step in precision agriculture.

items.title_zh: 华尔街大行获得Anthropic IPO承销权
items.title_en: Wall Street's biggest banks just landed Anthropic IPO
items.summary_zh: 据报道，华尔街多家大型银行已获得人工智能初创公司Anthropic的首次公开募股（IPO）承销权。Anthropic是开发Claude系列AI模型的公司，被视为OpenAI的主要竞争对手之一。此次IPO预计将成为科技领域最受关注的上市事件之一，可能为Anthropic带来巨额融资，进一步推动其AI研发和商业化。华尔街大行的参与表明市场对AI公司的高度兴趣，同时也反映了Anthropic在AI安全研究方面的独特定位受到资本认可。
items.summary_en: Wall Street's biggest banks just landed Anthropic IPO Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: Anthropic的IPO是AI领域最受瞩目的资本事件之一，华尔街大行的参与凸显了市场对AI安全与前沿技术商业化的信心。
items.why_en: Anthropic's IPO is one of the most anticipated capital events in AI, with Wall Street's involvement underscoring market confidence in AI safety and commercialization of cutting-edge technology.

items.title_zh: 华为云发布新一代ModelArts Next模型训推平台，使能模型深入企业场景-AI云资讯
items.title_en: Huawei Cloud Launches ModelArts Next to Drive AI Models into Enterprise Scenarios
items.summary_zh: 华为云发布新一代ModelArts Next模型训推平台，使能模型深入企业场景-AI云资讯 icloudnews.net
items.summary_en: Huawei Cloud unveiled the new ModelArts Next platform for model training and inference, aiming to integrate AI models into enterprise scenarios. The platform supports end-to-end workflows, helping businesses deploy AI more efficiently.
items.why_zh: 该平台降低了企业使用AI的门槛，推动AI技术从实验室走向实际生产。
items.why_en: This platform lowers the barrier for enterprises to adopt AI, accelerating the transition from lab to production.

items.title_zh: 汤道生承认腾讯业务线快慢不一，姚顺雨透露 AI 下半场主攻三方向
items.title_en: Tang Daosheng Admits Uneven Progress; Yao Shunyu Outlines Three AI Directions
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，在今日的 2026 腾讯云 AI 产业应用大会现场，针对外界“腾讯慢了”的批评，腾讯集团高级执行副总裁汤道生作出回应， 其承认在复杂组织中不同业务线速度不一 ，有快有慢，也有失败与探索，对外界批评与提醒持开放态度并接受建议。 汤道生表示：“在这样的一个长跑，我相信模型会不断迭代，用户的需求也在不断变化，也会有新的产品形态出现， 我觉得我们今年年初对龙虾这一波热潮也反应比较快 。” 据《科创板日报》报道，腾讯首席 AI 科学家姚顺雨表示，AI 下半场最重要的是， 我们应该在中国建立一个长期的 AGI 组织 。今天的 AI 可以分为三部分： 首先要重点关注预训练和后训练等基础性工作的操作与优化，夯实技术底座； 其次，在产品方面要将基础技术转化为实际产品，使其能真正为社会和人类创造价值； 第三，要积极探索新的研究范式、发掘新的机会。 IT之家获悉，2026 腾讯云 AI 产业应用大会于今日（6 月 5 日）在北京国家会议中心举行，除了汤道生和姚顺雨的对谈，下午还有多个专场、产品发布环节。
items.summary_en: At the 2026 Tencent Cloud AI Conference, Tang Daosheng acknowledged varying speeds across business lines. Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu emphasized building a long-term AGI organization in China, focusing on foundation models, productization, and new research paradigms.
items.why_zh: 腾讯高层首次公开承认内部节奏差异，并明确了AI战略方向，对行业竞争格局有重要影响。
items.why_en: Tencent's top executives publicly acknowledged internal pace differences and clarified AI strategy, impacting industry competition.

items.title_zh: 腾讯首发效率智能体工具集，覆盖20多个垂直场景Agent
items.title_en: Tencent Debuts Efficiency Agent Toolkit Covering 20+ Vertical Scenarios
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，腾讯在2026腾讯云AI产业应用大会上首次系统发布“效率智能体工具集”，针对20多个垂直场景提供差异化的智能体解决方案。针对个人用户，本地AI助手QClaw首创“微信直连”模式，并打通腾讯文档、腾讯会议、ima、QQ邮箱等工具。面向职场人群，腾讯推出了“Buddy”家族系列产品。针对企业用户，腾讯还正式发布WorkBuddy企业版及办公智能体套件Agent Suite，升级企业智能体管控平台ClawPro和智能体开发平台ADP 4.0。
items.summary_en: Tencent launched its 'Efficiency Agent Toolkit' at the 2026 Tencent Cloud AI Conference, covering over 20 vertical scenarios. It includes QClaw for personal use, Buddy series for professionals, and WorkBuddy enterprise edition.
items.why_zh: 该工具集标志着腾讯在AI Agent领域的系统化布局，将AI能力深度融入办公场景。
items.why_en: This toolkit marks Tencent's systematic push into AI agents, deeply integrating AI into workplace scenarios.

items.title_zh: 深圳国产芯片成功训练万亿级 AI 大模型：依托华为昇腾 910C，达到工业级运行标准
items.title_en: Shenzhen Team Trains Trillion-Parameter AI Model on Domestic Ascend 910C Chips
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，据“深圳发布”今日消息，深圳河套学院 AI 训练平台项目团队，联合哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）、深圳市大数据研究院、华为有关团队，协同深智城 AI 算力平台，面向国产算力大模型训练开展联合攻关。 依托昇腾 910C 国产 AI 算力集群，完成 1.6 万亿参数大模型 DeepSeek-V4-Pro 全参数后训练 。 此次实践为全球第三方机构在国产算力平台上完成该级别模型训练的相关探索积累了重要经验，也印证了国产 AI 芯片可支撑世界级超大参数模型训练工作。 目前，项目已实现模型算力利用率（MFU）超过 30%，关键训练算子效率提升 14%， 各项指标均达到工业级运行标准 。 从技术应用角度来看，调用已有模型开展业务推理，与从零完成模型全参数训练分属不同技术环节，二者在技术难度、硬件要求上存在明显区别。 本次试验结果表明，国产 AI 算力已可承担顶级大模型训练任务，相关技术路径具备可行性 。 据IT之家此前报道，在去年 9 月的华为全联接大会 2025 上，华为副董事长、轮值董事长徐直军称昇腾芯片将不断演进，更多芯片还在规划。
items.summary_en: A Shenzhen team trained the 1.6-trillion-parameter DeepSeek-V4-Pro model on Huawei's Ascend 910C cluster, achieving over 30% MFU and industrial-grade standards, proving domestic chips can handle top-tier AI training.
items.why_zh: 这是全球第三方机构在国产算力平台上完成万亿级模型训练的重要突破，验证了国产AI芯片的可行性。
items.why_en: This breakthrough validates that domestic AI chips can support trillion-parameter model training, a milestone for China's AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 智谱市值跌破6000亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu's Market Cap Falls Below 600 Billion HKD
items.summary_zh: 智谱市值跌破6000亿港元 东方财富
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market capitalization has dropped below 600 billion HKD. The company, which listed in Hong Kong and is pursuing a STAR Market IPO, faces concerns over high growth but also high losses.
items.why_zh: 市值下跌反映了市场对AI公司盈利能力和估值泡沫的担忧，可能影响后续融资和IPO进程。
items.why_en: The decline reflects market concerns over AI company profitability and valuation, potentially impacting future fundraising and IPO plans.

items.title_zh: 姚顺雨正面回应为何选择加入腾讯：最重要的原因是文化
items.title_en: Yao Shunyu Cites Culture as Key Reason for Joining Tencent
items.summary_zh: 6 月 5 日上午消息，今日举办的 2026 年腾讯云 AI 产业应用大会上，腾讯集团高级执行副总裁、云与智慧产业事业群 CEO 汤道生，将对谈腾讯首席 AI 科学家姚顺雨，对话主题为腾讯 AI 下半场。 谈及为什么选择来到腾讯，姚顺雨表示，“ 最重要的原因是文化 ，我记得第一次和你（汤道生）聊天的时候，包括和很多其他总办的老板们聊天的时候，我的第一印象就是大家都非常的诚实，就是哪里做得好，哪里做得不好，都非常直白，不会去掩盖，我觉得这种坦诚是我的第一个重要原因。” 姚顺雨还谈到，“第二个原因在于腾讯总体是一个基于 trust，而不是基于 metric 去运转的公司，我觉得这一点对于做 AI 是非常重要的，包括我们对 长期主义 的这种坚持。” 资料显示，姚顺雨毕业于著名的“清华姚班”，之后在普林斯顿大学进修计算机科学博士。2024 年 8 月，姚顺雨加入了 OpenAI。在 OpenAI 期间，他担任研究科学家，专注于将大型语言模型从理论研究推向实际应用，特别是 AI Agent 的开发。据悉，其主导开发了 OpenAI 首个发布的智能体模型及产品，同时参与了 Deep Research 项目。2025 年姚顺雨还入选《麻省理工科技评论》TR35 榜单，成为该奖项中国区最年轻的入选者之一。 2025 年 12 月，腾讯升级大模型研发架构，新成立 AI Infra 部、AI Data…
items.summary_en: At the Tencent Cloud AI Conference, Yao Shunyu said he joined Tencent primarily for its culture of honesty, trust, and long-termism. Yao previously worked at OpenAI, leading the first agent model and contributing to Deep Research.
items.why_zh: 姚顺雨的加入和表态凸显了腾讯在AI人才争夺中的文化吸引力，对行业人才流动有风向标意义。
items.why_en: Yao's move highlights Tencent's cultural appeal in AI talent competition, signaling trends in talent flow.

items.title_zh: AI 推高成本，多款 2026 笔记本起跳内存回归 8GB
items.title_en: AI Costs Push 2026 Laptops Back to 8GB Base Memory
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，科技媒体 Tom's Hardware 今天（6 月 5 日）发布博文，通过观察 2026 台北国际电脑展， 指出 8GB 内存重返笔记本市场，从 449 美元到 1299.99 美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 8825 元人民币）机型都在跟进。 该媒体指出笔记本市场一度朝着 16GB 内存起跳标准靠拢。微软在 2024~2025 年间，推广 Windows 11 AI+ PC 设备，其标准之一就是至少配备 16GB 内存。 此外苹果也把 16GB 设为多数 Mac 产品的基础配置，市场曾普遍认为中端和高端笔记本已进入 16GB 时代。 不过伴随着内存和 AI 相关零部件价格上涨影响，以及苹果推出 MacBook Neo，带动 Windows 笔记本起跳内存重新降至 8GB。 该媒体指出包括戴尔 XPS 13（起价 699 美元）、宏碁 Swift Air 14（起价 699 美元）、驰为 UniBook（起价 449 美元）起跳内存都为 8GB。微软此前还表示将推出配备 8GB 的 Surface Laptop for Business（1299.99 美元） 。
items.summary_en: Due to rising memory and AI component costs, many 2026 laptops now start with 8GB RAM, reversing the 16GB trend. Models like Dell XPS 13 and Acer Swift Air 14 are affected.
items.why_zh: 这表明AI硬件成本正在影响消费电子产品的配置决策，可能延缓AI PC的普及。
items.why_en: This shows AI hardware costs are impacting consumer electronics configurations, potentially slowing AI PC adoption.

items.title_zh: 智谱赴港上市后，再冲科创板IPO：业绩高增长与高亏损并行 五大潜在风险
items.title_en: Zhipu Pursues STAR Market IPO After Hong Kong Listing, Balancing High Growth and Losses
items.summary_zh: 智谱赴港上市后，再冲科创板IPO：业绩高增长与高亏损并行 五大潜在风险 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI is pursuing a STAR Market IPO after its Hong Kong listing, with high growth but also high losses and five potential risks. Market concerns over valuation and profitability persist.
items.why_zh: 智谱的IPO动向反映了AI初创公司在资本市场的融资压力与风险，对行业估值体系有参考意义。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO moves reflect funding pressures and risks for AI startups, offering insights into industry valuation.

items.title_zh: 双双大跌！智谱市值跌破6000亿港元、MiniMax跌破2000亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu and MiniMax Market Caps Plunge
items.summary_zh: 双双大跌！智谱市值跌破6000亿港元、MiniMax跌破2000亿港元 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI's market cap fell below 600 billion HKD, down 34% from its peak, while MiniMax's dropped below 200 billion HKD. The declines reflect market concerns over AI startup valuations and profitability.
items.why_zh: 作为中国AI领域的头部公司，智谱和MiniMax的市值暴跌可能预示着AI行业估值调整的开始。
items.why_en: As leading Chinese AI companies, the sharp decline in Zhipu and MiniMax's valuations may signal a broader market correction in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: NBA中国与阿里巴巴合作打造的首个官方大模型上线
items.title_en: NBA China and Alibaba Launch First Official AI Model
items.summary_zh: NBA中国与阿里巴巴合作打造的首个官方大模型上线 东方财富
items.summary_en: NBA China and Alibaba have launched their first official AI model, aimed at enhancing fan experience through personalized content, smart customer service, and game analysis.
items.why_zh: 这是体育IP与AI技术深度融合的典型案例，可能引领体育行业数字化转型新趋势。
items.why_en: This is a typical case of deep integration between sports IP and AI technology, potentially leading a new trend in digital transformation of the sports industry.

items.title_zh: 5 月裁员 38242 人：美国科技行业刷新近 2 年单月最高裁员纪录，AI 成首要理由
items.title_en: US Tech Sector Cuts 38,242 Jobs in May, AI Cited as Top Reason
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，职业咨询公司 Challenger, Gray & Christmas 昨日（6 月 4 日）发布博文，统计美国科技公司公告的裁员人数， 发现今年 5 月累计裁员 38242 人，不仅位居各行业之首，也刷新该行业近 2 年来单月裁员规模纪录。 从横向对比看，5 月全行业裁员总量约 97000 人，高于 4 月的 83387 人。运输业以 6909 人位列第 2，服务业以 6268 人排在第 3，科技行业裁员规模明显高出一截。 在裁员原因上，AI 连续 3 个月成为各行业最常被提及的解释。Challenger 高管 Andy Challenger 直言，AI 已成为企业裁员时给出的首要理由。 更受关注的是，裁员潮与 AI 投资潮几乎同步出现。谷歌、亚马逊、微软和 Meta 计划在 2026 年合计投入 7250 亿元资本支出，同比增加 77%。 IT之家附上参考地址 Jun 04 Challenger Report: May Job Cuts Rise 16% from April; Highest May Total Since 2020
items.summary_en: US tech companies laid off 38,242 workers in May, the highest monthly total in nearly two years, with AI cited as the primary reason for job cuts. Major tech firms plan to invest $725 billion in capex by 2026.
items.why_zh: AI既是裁员的原因，也是投资的重点，凸显AI对就业和资本流向的深远影响。
items.why_en: AI is both a reason for layoffs and a focus of investment, highlighting its profound impact on employment and capital flows.

items.title_zh: 估值近 450 亿美元，DeepSeek 首轮融资获“国家大基金”领投磋商

items.summary_en: Chinese AI company DeepSeek is in talks for its first funding round, with a valuation of nearly $45 billion, led by China's Big Fund. This marks DeepSeek's first external capital raise and signals strategic state support for AI infrastructure.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek作为中国AI大模型领域的明星公司，其首轮融资规模和国资背景的领投方，反映了中国在AI领域的资本布局和政策导向。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's first funding round, with a high valuation and state-backed lead investor, highlights China's strategic capital deployment in AI.

items.title_zh: AMD 展示其首个机架级 AI 平台 Helios，对垒英伟达 NVL72 VR200
items.title_en: AMD Unveils First Rack-Scale AI Platform Helios, Challenging Nvidia NVL72
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，科技媒体 Tom's Hardware 今天（6 月 5 日）发布博文，报道称在 2026 台北国际电脑展上， AMD 公开展示其首个机架级 AI 平台 Helios。 IT之家注：首批方案由合作伙伴展示，核心配置包括第 6 代 EPYC Venice 处理器与 Instinct MI455X 加速器，计划于 2026 年内供货，定位高端 AI 基础设施市场，对垒英伟达的 NVL72 VR200。 硬件规格方面，AMD Helios 可搭载最多 256 核的 EPYC Venice 处理器，并集成 72 颗 Instinct MI455X 加速器，总计配备 31TB HBM4 显存与 1400TB/s 带宽。 性能方面，在 FP4（4 位浮点，常见于 AI 训练和推理加速场景）稠密精度下，理论可以达到 2900 PFLOPS（每秒千万亿次浮点运算）。 该媒体指出在算力方面，Helios 略落后于英伟达 VR200 NVL72，但在 HBM4 显存容量上占优，更适合大语言模型等显存密集型任务。 互联设计方面，72 颗加速器之间通过 UALink-over-Ethernet（基于以太网的 UALink）互连，聚合 scale-up 带宽最高可达 260TB/s，与英伟达 NVL72 VR200 处于同一量级。 系统还将配备 Pensando Vulcano…
items.summary_en: AMD unveiled Helios, its first rack-scale AI platform, featuring 72 Instinct MI455X accelerators and 31TB HBM4 memory, targeting Nvidia's NVL72. It offers superior memory capacity for LLM workloads and is expected to ship in 2026.
items.why_zh: Helios是AMD在AI基础设施领域挑战英伟达的重要产品，可能改变高端AI计算市场格局。
items.why_en: Helios is a key product for AMD to challenge Nvidia in AI infrastructure, potentially reshaping the high-end AI computing market.

items.why_zh: 若合作属实，赛力斯与字节跳动的组合可能复制问界的成功，改变智能汽车竞争格局。
